summary: CSV/Excel Export feature for Revenue Tracking module fully tested. All 11 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Export functionality works correctly with filters.

warnings.description: WebSocket notification connection fails on page load - not related to Export feature
warnings.details: WebSocket connection to /api/ws/notifications fails - this is a pre-existing issue

critical_code_review_comments: Export endpoint properly returns StreamingResponse with text/csv content-type
Content-Disposition header correctly set with attachment and filename
CSV header row matches specification: Date, Platform, Content Title, Source, Amount (USD), Currency, Description
All filters work correctly: platform_id, source, date_from, date_to
Export count matches transactions API count (data integrity verified)
Frontend Export CSV buttons have correct data-testid attributes
Download triggers correctly via fetch with Bearer token authentication
Success toast appears after export completes
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded revenue data from previous tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: CSV Export feature fully tested. Test credentials: owner@bigmannentertainment.com / Test1234!. Auth returns 'access_token' not 'token'. Export endpoint at GET /api/revenue/export returns CSV with proper headers. Frontend buttons: data-testid='revenue-export-btn' (header) and data-testid='tx-export-btn' (transactions tab).

backend_apis.CSV header row: PASS - Contains: Date, Platform, Content Title, Source, Amount (USD), Currency, Description
backend_apis.CSV data rows: PASS - Contains 278 data rows matching transactions count
backend_apis.Filter: platform_id=spotify: PASS - Returns only Spotify transactions (27 rows)
backend_apis.Data integrity: PASS - Export count matches transactions API total

frontend_ui.Download trigger: PASS - Clicking export triggers file download
frontend_ui.Filtered export: PASS - Export respects platform and source filters
frontend_ui.Success toast: PASS - 'CSV exported successfully' toast appears after export

mocked_data_note: NO MOCKED APIs - Export endpoint connected to real MongoDB data
